title: ColumnClassificationFacet
description: Custom OpenLineage facet for column-level PII / PHI classification

_producer.description: URI identifying the producer of this facet

_schemaURL.description: URL to the JSON schema for this facet

pii_columns.description: Column names classified as PII (personally identifiable information)

phi_columns.description: Column names classified as PHI (protected health information under HIPAA). Defaults to the pii classification when a contract does not annotate phi explicitly.
